### Before submitting, please confirm you have done the following:

<!-- 💡 Please replace each `[ ]` with `[X]` when the step is complete 💡 -->

- [ ] Did you reference a related issue? If there isn't one, please create one.
- [ ] Did you update the version number in `meson.build` it should match what is in `main`?
- [ ] Please briefly describe the changes.
- [ ] Did you add yourself to `DEVELOPERS/ARTISTS/DESIGNERS` in `Application.vala`?
- [ ] Did you make sure any additional maintainers are tagged (if any)?

<!-- 💡 Please remove this template once you have confirmed all items are complete (if applicable) 💡 -->
